proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=97, 93.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +41.4pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8690 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)

Regime is shifting (6 days Choppy with 1 Bear day in 7d window); if Bear re-emerges, cohort activates and TAKE_SMALL sizing is the only brake on incremental UP_TRI exposure, which already dominates open book (36/38)
R-multiple 0.61 still flagged under D-8 review per project_anchor §7
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=97, wr=93.7%, edge +41.4pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=97, Wilson lower 0.869, +41.4pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 6), so the cohort is dormant and the 100% Choppy concentration on 38 open positions is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-21) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: BULL_PROXY × Bear: n=17, 88.2% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=BULL_PROXY, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +29.5pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.6566 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.98 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
Bear regime recently appeared (1 day in last 7d window), so cohort activation is plausible in near term
Cohort is dormant under current Choppy regime; promotion is positional rather than immediately impactful
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
n=17 is modest; a single sample-cluster bias check is warranted but no evidence of it surfaced
R-multiple 0.98 near Tier S boundary — sensitive to D-8 forced-exit review outcomes
approval would propagate redundant to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=17, wr=88.2%, edge +29.5pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=17, Wilson lower 0.6566 above Tier M floor, +29.5pp edge over BULL_PROXY baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.98 (<1.0). Cohort is regime-gated to Bear but current regime is Choppy (shifting, day 6); portfolio Bear exposure is minimal while the 100% concentration trigger is on Choppy, so a Bear-gated BULL_PROXY promotion does not compound flagged concentration and may diversify when Bear re-emerges. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-06-19, 06-20, 06-21) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime 100%; UP_TRI signal 94.7%; UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell 23.68% (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime 100%; UP_TRI signal 94.7%; UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell 23.68%; recommended action: Pause new UP_TRI entries in Pharma until cell share drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; additionally pause any new entries that increase Choppy-regime or UP_TRI-signal share until regime diversifies or cohort tier promotes above Candidate. Consider Nifty/index short hedge sized to ~20-25% of book notional to offset Choppy→Bear tail risk.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire long-only book simultaneously with no statistical justification (Candidate-tier cohort), and Pharma-sector clustering means a sector-specific shock (regulatory/USFDA news) compounds the directional drawdown — no offsetting short or low-correlation exposure exists.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy at observed 1.0 vs 0.80 threshold (38/38 positions)
UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell at 0.2368 (9/38) breaches 0.20 cell threshold
UP_TRI signal_type share at 36/38 = 0.947 above 0.85 threshold
Three additional cells cluster near threshold: Bank 15.79%, FMCG 15.79%, Chem 10.53%
Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort tier=Candidate (n=234) — unvalidated edge
Book is fully directional long (UP_TRI + BULL_PROXY = 38/38)
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime 100%; UP_TRI signal 94.7%; UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell 23.68%
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new UP_TRI entries in Pharma until cell share drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; additionally pause any new entries that increase Choppy-regime or UP_TRI-signal share until regime diversifies or cohort tier promotes above Candidate. Consider Nifty/index short hedge sized to ~20-25% of book notional to offset Choppy→Bear tail risk.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would unwind the entire long-only book simultaneously with no statistical justification (Candidate-tier cohort), and Pharma-sector clustering means a sector-specific shock (regulatory/USFDA news) compounds the directional drawdown — no offsetting short or low-correlation exposure exists.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (observed 1.0, above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI×Choppy×Pharma cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 23.68% (9 of 38 positions). UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 36/38 = 94.7% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=234) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
